summary: Clear front‑of‑board audience recording of a solid Pittsburgh show with a good set list and minor hiccup on Mississippi Half‑Step
review: Both reviewers praise the front‑of‑board Schoeps capture, noting Dan Healy’s excellent work and overall very good sound despite a wonky start to Mississippi Half‑Step. The concert is described as solid and fun with all the right songs, though no specific standout moments are singled out.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave high marks (5 and 4 stars) and highlighted a good performance and strong recording, with only minor issues noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑board Schoeps mics sound awesome; Dan Healy’s mix praised. Slightly wonky start on Mississippi Half‑Step but improves quickly; overall clear and enjoyable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Solid, fun show with a set list that has "all the right stuff"; no major performance issues mentioned.
